title: 有馬記念の後に・恩讐の果てに

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Dreams... Ya know, everyone talks 'bout how
sparkly dreams are, but they're a lot dirtier than
people think.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I can't tell ya how many times I've had to spit
sand outta my mouth and dust myself off after a
race. My catchphrases were "Dang it!" and "Just
you wait!"

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But all that crap just fueled the storm inside me.
And now that the storm has carried me here, I
feel... I feel...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: WOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I DID IIIIT!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And Tamamo Cross dominates the last grand prix
of the year! The highest honor in Japan belongs
to her!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Trainer, I won!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And... it's all thanks to you. No way I coulda
become the strongest version of White Lightning I
could be without ya!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Y'know, racin'... Racin's pretty fun, yeah? Who woulda thought it'd get me so pumped—feel so good.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: To me, runnin' was just my ticket outta rock bottom. Maybe that's why it took me so long to figure out that I shouldn't be going higher... but deeper.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Once I started diggin' deeper and deeper into
that rock bottom... I finally came out on the other
side—and that's how I got here.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oguri...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Are you going to quit?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...What are ya—

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Now that you've shown me what you can do... are
you planning to quit?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What about me? What am I supposed to do?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm only going to get stronger—faster. But...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What's the point... if I can't race with you?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Chasing my dream is what brought me all this
way... but you're saying the dream's over?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: When you're the one bursting with energy...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Me? Burstin' with energy?
Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
My body's... well, I can't complain. Spent
everythin' I had today. Down to the very last
drop.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But it's kinda weird... I still got this buzzin' and
cracklin' feelin' inside me. I'm burnin' real hot.
Almost like—

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whaddaya mean? Reborn as what?
choice_data_list:
As a bolt of lightning, craving its next chance to
strike.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
A cravin', huh? That makes sense. With you here
to pull me back up...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I've gotten strong enough to handle anythin'.
Even an all-star brawl like this. Which means...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey, Creek! Get over here, would ya!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Just a moment, Tamtam.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The two classic-year racers stand side-by-side.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, you two. Both of your runs need a lotta
work.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I get that you're still classic-year racers, but
Creek, ya can't let yourself wimp out towards the
end.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
How're the fans s'posed to go wild when their
favorite is waverin' in the final stretch? You're
gonna make 'em worry.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Pretty clear to me that I can't leave just yet.
Before I ride off into the sunset, I'm puttin' both
of ya through the ringer! You better watch your
backs, cuz I'm comin' for ya!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So next year, if you don't want a repeat of today,
ya better run with all ya got! Got it?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Tama... Thank you so, so much. I... I'll be ready
for you!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Me, too... I want to beat you too, Tamtam!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: WOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text: Tama... Ya did it... Ya really did it...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text:
Can you see her, Mom? This is the last thing your
son can do for ya. Can ya see my li'l girl? Can ya
see our Tamamo Cross?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
Oh yes, I can see her very well... Oh, she's just
burstin' with energy.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Looks like it's over, Rudolf. One last battle of the
greats to bring this wonderful year to an end.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
That was a good race, wasn't it? Everyone's
improved so much. And the fans were delighted
as well.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You're right. Tamamo Cross and Oguri Cap have
a rivalry that mirrors our own. It may even surpass
ours.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Theirs is a clash of titans. But there's still more to
their conflict.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Oh? There's more?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, don't you hear it, C.B? I certainly do. Yes,
this is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, Tamamo Cross joins the winner's circle.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Did all of ya see dat?! How's that for a shock to
da system?!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Now, I know some of ya were sayin' I'm a
washout—a has-been! Wanna tell me how dat
turned out for ya?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But hey, I'm not one for grudges. Guess I'm just in
a good mood today. Wonder why.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wahahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oguri, c'mere.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: O-okay.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I want all my fans to know that this racer right
here's the reason my races were so intense. She lit
a fire in me, and I can't thank her enough.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But don't get it twisted! I'm not throwin' in the
towel just yet!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
This rivalry's gonna lead the Twinkle Series next
year! And the year after that too!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So to all the rookies comin' outta the woodwork, I
say... bring it! 'Cause this is where the second half
of the Legend of White Lightning begins!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And this was how White Lightning came to appear
at the end of one generation before sprinting off
into the next.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In this next chapter, however, she doesn't have to make her dream come true—she wants to.
